Title: Stripe amount taken from client input
Description: Charge uses $request->price from a hidden form field instead of server cart total. Customer can pay any amount via DevTools.
Recommended Fix: Always charge $cartTotal * 100 computed server-side from session cart; never trust $request->price.

Title: stripePost() never calls Stripe — fake payment success
Description: Hardcodes transaction_id and marks order paid with no Stripe API call. Any authenticated user can mark orders paid for free.
Recommended Fix: Verify charge/PaymentIntent via Stripe API or webhook before marking paid; remove legacy payment.blade.php flow.

Title: Cart option price trusted from client
Description: addToCart builds adjustedPrice from client-sent option price/prefix instead of DB ProductOptionValue.
Recommended Fix: Re-fetch each option price from DB by ID server-side.

Title: Raw card PAN/CVV/expiry POSTed to app server
Description: JS .empty() clears DOM children not input values — raw card data reaches Laravel logs (PCI-DSS risk).
Recommended Fix: Remove legacy Stripe.js v2 flow or null .val() and use Stripe Elements only.

Title: Product stock check has no row lock (overselling)
Description: Primary total_stock check-then-decrement lacks lockForUpdate(); concurrent checkouts can oversell.
Recommended Fix: Wrap read+decrement in DB transaction with lockForUpdate().

Title: Order thank-you page IDOR
Description: thankYou(Order $order) has no ownership check — any user can view another customer's order.
Recommended Fix: abort_unless($order->user_id === auth()->id() 403).

Title: Hardcoded product ID in custom-sign builder
Description: Add to Cart uses data-product-id=94 hardcoded; all customizations attach to product 94.
Recommended Fix: Pass real product to view and bind its ID.

Title: Dead Flutterwave form posts to third-party demo URL
Description: Hidden form POSTs to geniusdevs.com CodeCanyon demo endpoint with fake token.
Recommended Fix: Delete leftover template markup.

Title: Two disconnected cart/checkout systems
Description: Session cart vs DB Cart; multiple checkout paths with different trust assumptions.
Recommended Fix: Pick one cart/checkout implementation; delete the other.

Title: Client ProductController unscoped edit/update/delete
Description: edit/update/delete/update_status missing client_id scope — tenant can modify another store's products.
Recommended Fix: Scope all lookups with where client_id auth guard client id.

Title: Client change_payment_status unscoped
Description: Any client can flip another tenant's transaction paid/unpaid.
Recommended Fix: Scope by client_id.

Title: Client transactions_delete unscoped + wrong column
Description: Unscoped delete; Order::whereOrderId uses wrong column.
Recommended Fix: Scope and query Transaction correctly.

Title: Client OptionController wrong guard / unscoped option values
Description: edit/update use auth()->id() instead of client guard; option_value_* have no ownership check.
Recommended Fix: Use client guard and scope all mutations.

Title: Client Faq/Brand/Category/FaqCategory IDOR
Description: edit/update/delete/update_status missing client_id scope.
Recommended Fix: Add client_id scope to every mutation lookup.

Title: Client BlogController update unscoped
Description: update() unscoped while edit/delete are scoped.
Recommended Fix: Scope update() the same way.

Title: Client SubscribeController destroy never deletes
Description: Looks up row but never calls delete() — false success message.
Recommended Fix: Call ->delete() after ownership check.

Title: CompareController remove is no-op / no ownership
Description: findOrFail without delete or ownership check.
Recommended Fix: Delete after verifying user_id.

Title: WishList remove without ownership
Description: Deletes wishlist by raw ID — any user can delete others' entries.
Recommended Fix: Scope by auth()->id() before delete.

Title: Profile update silently resets password to empty hash
Description: Hash::make($request->password) ?? never falls back — empty password hashed on every save.
Recommended Fix: Only update password when $request->filled('password').

Title: Admin CustomerController wipes password on every edit
Description: Unconditional password hash on customer edit.
Recommended Fix: Only hash when password field is filled.

Title: Client profile password wipe pattern
Description: Same Hash::make ?? anti-pattern.
Recommended Fix: Only update when password filled.

Title: User profile unique validation excludes self
Description: email/phone unique:users without ignore current user — unchanged profile fails.
Recommended Fix: Use Rule::unique()->ignore(auth()->id()).

Title: Billing/shipping address null crash
Description: Assumes address row exists — fatal on first save.
Recommended Fix: Use updateOrCreate or null-check.

Title: Password reset token never expires
Description: Token existence checked but not expiry.
Recommended Fix: Enforce token expiry window.

Title: Open redirect on register
Description: redirect_to query param with no local-URL check.
Recommended Fix: Whitelist local paths only.

Title: Admin phone uniqueness checks users table
Description: Phone uniqueness against users instead of admins.
Recommended Fix: Validate against admins table.

Title: Client phone uniqueness checks users table
Description: Phone uniqueness against users instead of clients.
Recommended Fix: Validate against clients table.

Title: Stored XSS in blog description
Description: Unescaped {!! $blog->description !!}; Client/Admin save without sanitization.
Recommended Fix: Sanitize with HTML purifier on save; prefer escaped output where possible.

Title: Stored XSS in FAQ details
Description: {!! $faq->details !!} unsanitized.
Recommended Fix: Purify on save.

Title: Unescaped category name in admin AJAX HTML
Description: Builds option HTML by concatenating category name.
Recommended Fix: Escape htmlspecialchars when building HTML.

Title: CustomImage uses original filename + move()
Description: Unsanitized original name; overwrite risk; bypasses FileUploadHelper.
Recommended Fix: Use FileUploadHelper::upload with randomized names.

Title: CKEditor upload no type validation
Description: Moves to public/media without extension whitelist (arbitrary upload if re-enabled).
Recommended Fix: Validate mime/extension; use FileUploadHelper; do not re-enable without fix.

Title: Product enquiry dd() on S3 failure
Description: dd() dumps exception on public unauthenticated form.
Recommended Fix: Return JSON error; log exception; never dd() in production.

Title: Admin destructive actions as GET routes
Description: delete/update_status as GET — CSRF and accidental trigger risk.
Recommended Fix: Change to POST/DELETE with CSRF tokens.

Title: Client SubCategory/ChildCategory wired to Admin controllers
Description: Client routes hit Admin controllers/views gated by auth:admin.
Recommended Fix: Point to Client controllers or remove routes.

Title: Doubled slash in change-payment-status route
Description: /change-payment-status//{id} typo breaks route() links.
Recommended Fix: Fix path to single slash.

Title: Plaintext password emailed to new client
Description: Welcome email sends plaintext password.
Recommended Fix: Use invite/reset link instead of emailing password.

Title: PageController mass-assigns unvalidated type
Description: update($request->all()) allows injecting type.
Recommended Fix: Pass only validated fields.

Title: URL::forceScheme trusts x-forwarded-proto early
Description: Runs before TrustProxies — trusts header from any client.
Recommended Fix: Configure trusted proxies only; move after TrustProxies.

Title: MAIL_FROM fallback is personal Gmail
Description: Developer Gmail used if env unset.
Recommended Fix: Use generic placeholder.

Title: ProductOption class not imported — fatal + data loss
Description: ProductOption::create unresolved; update deletes options then fatals.
Recommended Fix: Import App\Models\ProductOption; wrap in transaction.

Title: CustomSizeController stubs / wrong view / missing methods
Description: edit wrong view; update/destroy stubs; routes call missing methods.
Recommended Fix: Implement full CRUD matching CustomImage pattern.

Title: CustomColorController missing CRUD methods
Description: Routes call edit/update/delete/update_status that do not exist.
Recommended Fix: Implement missing controller methods.

Title: CustomImageController update/destroy stubs
Description: No DB write/file delete but reports success.
Recommended Fix: Implement real update/destroy with FileUploadHelper.

Title: WebsiteController assigns UploadedFile to DB
Description: File move commented out; UploadedFile mass-assigned — insert crash.
Recommended Fix: Upload via FileUploadHelper then store path string.

Title: Blog uploadImage method commented out
Description: Route points to commented method — editor image upload fatals.
Recommended Fix: Restore method using FileUploadHelper with validation.

Title: get_child_category method missing
Description: Route maps to get_child_category but controller has getSubCategory.
Recommended Fix: Align route name with existing method or add method.

Title: Missing website_id/client_id columns on models
Location: Blog Faq Order Transaction Category Brand Subscribe etc.
Description: Fillable/relations declare columns that do not exist in DB — SQL errors.
Recommended Fix: Add migrations or remove dead fillable/relations.

Title: WebsiteTemplate validates wrong table
Description: exists:websitetemplates
Recommended Fix: id should be websites.

Title: Admin/Client password not hashed cast
Description: Unlike User.php no hashed cast on password.
Recommended Fix: Add hashed cast for consistency.

Title: Cart updateQuantity product ID prefix collision
Description: Str::startsWith productId 1 matches key 12-...
Recommended Fix: Match exact cart key or delimiter-safe ID.

Title: blog_search undefined $categories
Description: compact includes undefined $categories.
Recommended Fix: Define variable or remove from compact.

Title: transactions_delete removes entire Order
Description: Deletes parent Order with Transaction — sibling data loss.
Recommended Fix: Delete only the Transaction row.

Title: ManageSite settings methods null crash
Description: first() then save without null check (except home_page).
Recommended Fix: Use updateOrCreate for all settings keys.

Title: Home page about image1 not using FileUploadHelper
Description: Raw $home_page_value->image1 path — broken image after S3 migration.
Recommended Fix: Use FileUploadHelper::url with fallback (fixed in session).

Title: Broken static asset paths on home
Description: media/icon.svg section.jpg image8.jpg CustomerPhotos.png missing on disk.
Recommended Fix: Point to existing assets/imgs SVG or CSS gradients (fixed).

Title: primary_btn / primery_btn text invisible
Description: z-index:-1 on .btn; hover inverted to white bg with white text.
Recommended Fix: Renamed to primary_btn; fixed hover keep orange+white text.

Title: Inconsistent button classes across dashboard
Description: Mixed primary_btn btn-primary btn_black.
Recommended Fix: Standardized on btn primary_btn.

Title: S3/Storage::disk url scattered in views
Description: Direct S3 URLs broke local/S3 toggle.
Recommended Fix: Migrated to FileUploadHelper::url across views.

Title: Upload/delete still used raw S3 in controllers
Description: Inconsistent storage after S3 migration.
Recommended Fix: Migrated store/update/delete to FileUploadHelper.

Title: Related pages still reference missing image8.jpg / CustomerPhotos.png
Location: contact thankyou about brand category blog service etc.
Description: Same broken fallbacks as home had before fix.
Recommended Fix: Apply same asset fallback pattern as home.blade.php.

Title: user-sidebar Remove Account hardcodes third-party URL
Description: Remove Account links to geniusdevs.com CodeCanyon demo.
Recommended Fix: Point to real local route or remove modal.
